creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Sat Mar 29 16:01:36 2014
New Revision: 349551
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349551
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349551/

Log:
  C++ Qt based JSON RPC2 library
  
  WWW: http://bitbucket.org/devonit/qjsonrpc
  
  PR:		ports/187070
  Submitted by:	Serguei Okladnikov <oklaspec@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/net/qjsonrpc/
  head/net/qjsonrpc/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/qjsonrpc/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/qjsonrpc/files/
  head/net/qjsonrpc/files/patch-tests__tests.pro   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/qjsonrpc/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/qjsonrpc/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/net/Makefile

Modified: head/net/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 15:58:48 2014	(r349550)
+++ head/net/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 16:01:36 2014	(r349551)
@@ -960,6 +960,7 @@
     SUBDIR += pyrad
     SUBDIR += pythondirector
     SUBDIR += qadsl
+    SUBDIR += qjsonrpc
     SUBDIR += qoauth
     SUBDIR += qt4-network
     SUBDIR += qt5-network

Added: head/net/qjsonrpc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/qjsonrpc/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 16:01:36 2014	(r349551)
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# Created by: Serguei Okladnikov <oklaspec@gmail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	qjsonrpc
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.1
+CATEGORIES=	net www devel
+MASTER_SITES=	http://bitbucket.org/devonit/qjsonrpc/get/
+DISTNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
+DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+
+MAINTAINER=	oklaspec@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	C++ Qt based JSON RPC2 library
+
+LICENSE=	LGPL21
+
+USES=		qmake
+USE_QT4=	moc_build network qmake_build qtestlib_build rcc_build
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/devonit-qjsonrpc-b138256fe2b8
+
+post-configure:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} 's|lib/pkgconfig|libdata/pkgconfig|g' \
+		${WRKSRC}/src/Makefile
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/net/qjsonrpc/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/qjsonrpc/distinfo	Sat Mar 29 16:01:36 2014	(r349551)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (qjsonrpc/v1.0.1.tar.gz) = e0d4754796bb271b9eeaab30b52eaaadec0d1d102de27cd828a0b73175019921
+SIZE (qjsonrpc/v1.0.1.tar.gz) = 101571

Added: head/net/qjsonrpc/files/patch-tests__tests.pro
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/qjsonrpc/files/patch-tests__tests.pro	Sat Mar 29 16:01:36 2014	(r349551)
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+--- ./tests/tests.pro.orig	2014-02-19 16:10:27.000000000 +0400
++++ ./tests/tests.pro	2014-02-19 17:14:00.000000000 +0400
+@@ -1,3 +1,2 @@
+ TEMPLATE = subdirs
+-SUBDIRS = auto \
+-          manual
++SUBDIRS = auto

Added: head/net/qjsonrpc/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/qjsonrpc/pkg-descr	Sat Mar 29 16:01:36 2014	(r349551)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+C++ Qt based JSON RPC2 library
+
+WWW: http://bitbucket.org/devonit/qjsonrpc

Added: head/net/qjsonrpc/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/qjsonrpc/pkg-plist	Sat Mar 29 16:01:36 2014	(r349551)
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+include/qjsonrpc/json/qjson_export.h
+include/qjsonrpc/json/qjsonarray.h
+include/qjsonrpc/json/qjsondocument.h
+include/qjsonrpc/json/qjsonobject.h
+include/qjsonrpc/json/qjsonvalue.h
+include/qjsonrpc/qjsonrpc_export.h
+include/qjsonrpc/qjsonrpcmessage.h
+include/qjsonrpc/qjsonrpcservice.h
+lib/libqjsonrpc.so
+lib/libqjsonrpc.so.1
+lib/libqjsonrpc.so.1.0
+lib/libqjsonrpc.so.1.0.0
+libdata/pkgconfig/qjsonrpc.pc
+@dirrm include/qjsonrpc/json
+@dirrm include/qjsonrpc
